title: David Leboe
compiled_truth: David Leboe is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-16 to 2002-05-21), David Leboe sent 14 and received 433 emails, totalling 447 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (3), [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (3), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (2), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (2), [Sheila Tweed](people/sheila-tweed) (2).
